# Every autonomous decision is explainable after the fact

`NEED-explainable-decisions`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| need | draft |

The mission operator must be able to review every VLM decision, understand what the model was thinking, and diagnose failures. This drives the reasoning field in the command schema, the decisions.jsonl audit log, the model-authored scratchpad, and the RTL fallback on parse failure.
